parameters.query:
WITH pwin_outcomes AS (
  SELECT f.context->>'agency' as agency, f.context->>'naics' as naics,
    f.predicted_value as predicted_pwin, f.actual_value as actual_outcome
  FROM gda_feedback f WHERE f.event_type IN ('win','loss','pwin_outcome')
  AND f.logged_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
),
action_completions AS (
  SELECT f.context->>'category' as category,
    AVG(f.actual_value) as completion_rate, COUNT(*) as sample_count
  FROM gda_feedback f WHERE f.event_type = 'action_completed'
  AND f.logged_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY f.context->>'category'
),
current_weights AS (
  SELECT weight_key, weight_value, confidence FROM gda_learned_weights
),
win_rate AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE event_type='win') as wins,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE event_type='loss') as losses,
    ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE event_type='win')/NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE event_type IN('win','loss')),0),1) as win_rate
  FROM gda_feedback WHERE event_type IN('win','loss') AND logged_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
)
SELECT
  (SELECT json_agg(p) FROM pwin_outcomes p) as pwin_data,
  (SELECT json_agg(a) FROM action_completions a) as action_data,
  (SELECT json_agg(w) FROM current_weights w) as current_weights,
  (SELECT row_to_json(o) FROM win_rate o) as win_rate_data,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_feedback WHERE logged_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days') as total_feedback_count;

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{status:'ok', message:'Fewer than 5 feedback events. Log outcomes via gda-feedback to activate learning.', checked_at: new Date().toISOString()}}];
